title: Gate Overflow Procedure
content: If any gate reaches 85% zone pressure and wait time exceeds 15 minutes, open overflow lane, move trained stewards to the gate, and divert arriving fans to the nearest lower-pressure entrance. Keep all actions reversible and logged.

title: Food Court Restock Playbook
content: When projected demand for a priority SKU exceeds current stock before kickoff, create a restock request and assign retail support from the service corridor. Do not directly alter POS inventory without tenant confirmation.

title: Facility Incident SLA
content: Medium facility incidents in high-traffic zones require assignment within 10 minutes and visible mitigation messaging when guest queues form. Create a maintenance ticket and dispatch qualified facility staff.

title: Tenant Promotion Approval Policy
content: Tenant campaigns may be drafted by operations systems but require manager approval before push notifications, signage, or paid placement. Campaigns should be used to move visitors toward lower-pressure retail zones.

title: Crowd Rerouting And Signage Procedure
content: When one entrance is critical and a neighboring entrance is below warning threshold, draft digital signage to redirect new arrivals. Rerouting must avoid sending guests through facility incident zones.
